text: Are we all familiar with the acronym
STEM in education? Do we all know what
it stands for? WHAT DOES IT STAND FOR?
SCIENCE, TECHNOLOGY, ENGINEERING, MATH.
SO, do you know that there is a
controversy surrounding this? Because
they want to add art
>> to STEM because the artists are feeling
excluded
[laughter]
>> and they want to make it
>> steam.
>> [laughter]
>> What are they trying to do to us? Do
they realize that if you add art to
STEM, there will be no steam?
>> What do they think? That the guy who
invented the steam engine ran a puppet
show on the side? [laughter]
They think they can JUST DISRUPT THE
WORLD ORDER LIKE THAT. How would they
like it if we added a spelling bee to
the NFL? [laughter]
